name: Blinding Attack and Resistance Aura Luck Scaling
description:
Adds Luck-based scaling to the Blinding Attack and Spell Resistance Aura of Unicorns and War Unicorns.

Both abilities keep their normal baseline chance when the creature has neutral Luck. Negative Luck reduces both effects, while positive Luck improves both effects. The upgraded version receives **stronger** positive Luck scaling.

## Creature Changes

* **Unicorn** — has both **Blinding Attack** and **Spell Resistance Aura** adjusted by Luck.
  * **-3 or lower Luck**: both chances are reduced to 10%.
  * **-2 Luck**: both chances are reduced to 13%.
  * **-1 Luck**: both chances are reduced to 17%.
  * **Neutral Luck**: both chances remain at 20%.
  * **+1 Luck**: both chances are increased to 25%.
  * **+2 Luck**: both chances are increased to 30%.
  * **+3 or higher Luck**: both chances are increased to 35%.

* **War Unicorn** — has both **Blinding Attack** and **Spell Resistance Aura** adjusted by Luck, with stronger positive scaling.
  * **-3 or lower Luck**: both chances are reduced to 10%.
  * **-2 Luck**: both chances are reduced to 13%.
  * **-1 Luck**: both chances are reduced to 17%.
  * **Neutral Luck**: both chances remain at 20%.
  * **+1 Luck**: both chances are increased to 30%.
  * **+2 Luck**: both chances are increased to 40%.
  * **+3 or higher Luck**: both chances are increased to 50%.
author: bew_
